creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

please show me the output of
 - grep openhab /etc/rc.conf
 - sh /usr/local/etc/rc.d/openhab status |& grep export

Did you completely delete the config after the deinstall of the old version? There are some parts left in some files which a deinstall doesn't delete (config files and tmp files in /var/db/openhab/).

Bye,
Alexander.
